Guidelines for Congenital Anomalies Surveillance and Reporting to CCASS
The Maternal, Child and Youth Health Unit, PHAC, and the Canadian Congenital Anomalies Surveillance Network have prepared guidelines to assist the provinces and territories in the development of their own surveillance systems and in reporting to the national system. These guidelines are available upon request from PHAC at the following coordinates:
Maternal, Child and Youth Health Surveillance and Epidemiology Division Centre for Chronic Disease Prevention 785 Carling Avenue, A.L. 6807A Ottawa, Ontario K1A 0K9 Email : CCASN-RCSAC@phac-aspc.gc.ca
